docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SWISTOWICZ, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O'BRIEN, SUSAN $2,369.50 PRINCIPAL, $59.00 INTEREST, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,538.50, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-08-2010 IS CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-19-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JUN-17-2010 AS TO DEFENDANT O'BRIEN, SUSAN
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-19-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,369.58 FILED BY SWISTOWICZ, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT O'BRIEN, SUSAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2009 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2009 - CONTINUED TO JUL-27-2009 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALAN SILVERMAN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-10-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-10-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ALAN SILVERMAN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
